title: We should be able to output images in non-OCI formats
body: We've always produced images that included OCI manifests and configuration data.  We should be able to also produce images in a format that can be consumed by dockerd, if only for the sake of being simpler to integrate into other tooling which has historically only produced images in that format.

comments.body: @nalind Doesn't https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/118 satisfy this issue?  Can we close?
Yes, though for simplicity's sake we also accept `docker` (until we need to be more specific, like if we ever add support for v2s1) as a type.
